user.title: Airych Cloud
user.description: Connect your Airych account. The server address is pre-filled; change it only if instructed.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Airych Cloud
reauth_confirm.description: Your session for {account_name} has expired. Pair again to restore the connection.

select_hubs.title: Choose VioStations
select_hubs.description: Select which VioStations should be imported into Home Assistant. Found {viostation_count} VioStation(s).

select_cameras.title: Choose VioCams
select_cameras.description: Select which VioCams should be imported from the selected VioStations. Found {camera_count} VioCam(s) under {viostation_count} VioStation(s).

progress.pairing:
Scan this QR code in the Airych app to finish pairing:

![QR code]({qr_code})

Pairing code: **{user_code}**

abort.pair_expired: Pairing timed out. Please try again.
abort.pair_denied: Pairing was denied in the app.
abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Airych server.
abort.no_devices: No Airych VioStations were found for this account.
abort.reauth_account_mismatch: Please sign in with the same account that was originally configured.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Airych server.
error.invalid_device_selection: Selected VioCams must belong to selected VioStations.

snapshot_settings.title: Snapshot settings
snapshot_settings.description: Control how often automatic camera preview refreshes request a fresh hub snapshot. Manual download snapshots always request a fresh image. Set to 0 to disable throttling.

select_hubs.title: Choose VioStations
select_hubs.description: Select which VioStations should be imported into Home Assistant. Found {viostation_count} VioStation(s).

select_cameras.title: Choose VioCams
select_cameras.description: Select which VioCams should be imported from the selected VioStations. Found {camera_count} VioCam(s) under {viostation_count} VioStation(s).

abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Airych server.
abort.no_devices: No Airych VioStations were found for this account.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Airych server.
error.invalid_device_selection: Selected VioCams must belong to selected VioStations.

play_hub_alarm.name: Play VioStation alarm
play_hub_alarm.description: Ask a VioStation to play an alarm sound. Backend/RPC wiring is reserved.

play_camera_alarm.name: Play VioCam alarm
play_camera_alarm.description: Ask a VioCam to play an alarm sound. Backend/RPC wiring is reserved.

start_camera_recording.name: Start VioCam recording
start_camera_recording.description: Ask a VioCam to start recording. Backend/RPC wiring is reserved.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Optional reason for App/cloud display or logging.

stop_camera_recording.name: Stop VioCam recording
stop_camera_recording.description: Ask a VioCam to stop recording. Backend/RPC wiring is reserved.

capture_camera_snapshot.name: Capture VioCam snapshot
capture_camera_snapshot.description: Request a fresh Airych cloud snapshot for a VioCam.

with_osd.name: Include OSD
with_osd.description: Include on-screen display if supported by the backend.

send_mobile_notification.name: Send Airych mobile notification
send_mobile_notification.description: Send a notification to the Airych mobile app. Backend wiring is reserved.

camera.name: Camera
camera.description: Optional VioCam context for the notification.

include_snapshot.name: Include snapshot
include_snapshot.description: Include a camera snapshot if supported by the backend.
